cases.question: 有效缴费记录中，哪些企业的最高缴费基数排在前5名？
cases.gold_sql: SELECT company_id, MAX(pay_base) AS max_pay_base FROM social_insurance_payment WHERE is_valid = '1' AND company_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY company_id ORDER BY max_pay_base DESC LIMIT 5;
cases.first_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.company_id,
  c.company_name,
  MAX(s.pay_base) AS max_pay_base
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
  company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
  s.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  c.company_id, c.company_name
ORDER BY 
  max_pay_base DESC
LIMIT 5;
cases.final_generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.company_id,
  MAX(s.pay_base) AS max_pay_base
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
  company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
  s.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  c.company_id
ORDER BY 
  max_pay_base DESC
LIMIT 5;

attempts.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.company_id,
  c.company_name,
  MAX(s.pay_base) AS max_pay_base
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
  company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
  s.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  c.company_id, c.company_name
ORDER BY 
  max_pay_base DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
  c.company_id,
  MAX(s.pay_base) AS max_pay_base
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
  company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
  s.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  c.company_id
ORDER BY 
  max_pay_base DESC
LIMIT 5;

cases.question: 统计各企业各险种的有效缴费总金额（缴费基数求和），并找出总金额超过50万的组合，按总金额从高到低排序。
cases.gold_sql: SELECT company_id, insurance_type, SUM(pay_base) AS total_pay_base FROM social_insurance_payment WHERE is_valid = '1' AND company_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY company_id, insurance_type HAVING SUM(pay_base) > 500000 ORDER BY total_pay_base DESC;

  c.company_name,
  s.insurance_type,
  SUM(s.pay_base) AS total_payment
FROM 
  social_insurance_payment s
JOIN 
  company_info c ON s.company_id = c.company_id
WHERE 
  s.is_valid = '1'
GROUP BY 
  c.company_id, c.company_name, s.insurance_type
HAVING 
  total_payment > 500000
ORDER BY 
  total_payment DESC;
